# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

type AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: boolean;
};

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: false,
};

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request) {
  let edgeConfigData: Partial<AppConfig> = {};

  if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    try {
      edgeConfigData = (await get<AppConfig>()) || {};
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config:', error);
      // Fallback to defaults if Edge Config is not accessible or misconfigured
    }
  } else {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable is not set. Using default configuration.');
  }

  const mergedConfig: AppConfig = {
    ...DEFAULT_CONFIG,
    ...edgeConfigData,
  };

  // Example usage of the configuration
  const { API_KEY, DB_URL, FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS } = mergedConfig;

  // Simulate an API call or database operation using the configuration
  const responseData = {
    message: 'Welcome to the Edge!',
    currentConfig: {
      apiKeyHint: API_KEY.substring(0, 10) + '...',
      databaseUrlHint: DB_URL.substring(0, 20) + '...',
      analyticsEnabled: FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? (Object.keys(edgeConfigData).length > 0 ? 'Edge Config' : 'Edge Config (empty, using defaults)') : 'Code Defaults',
    },
    exampleOperation: `Using API Key: ${API_KEY} for some service.`,
    featureStatus: FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS ? 'Analytics feature is ON.' : 'Analytics feature is OFF.',
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(responseData, null, 2), {
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json',
    },
  });
}
